footer.built: Designed and built by Efrain Cabrera.

hero.subtitle: I build scalable, AI-first web and mobile products with React, Next.js, Laravel and React Native — focused on real impact in production.

about.label: About
about.p1: Full-Stack developer with 5+ years building scalable, responsive web and mobile products. I work primarily with React, Next.js, Laravel, Nest.js and React Native.
about.p2: I specialize in applied-AI products: from construction cost estimation with blueprint analysis (GPT-5) to voice AI for field use. I've shipped solutions for construction, hospitality, real estate and healthcare, leading frontend architecture and designing secure multi-tenant systems with Row-Level Security.
about.p3: I'm passionate about performance optimization, clean UI/UX, and working end-to-end with multidisciplinary teams. I'm currently exploring modern stacks like Bun + TanStack Start + Convex, always with an AI-first approach.

wins.0: Restaurant management app and high-conversion landing (+35% conversion).
wins.1: Bills app for residential condos and React Native mobile app live on Google Play.
wins.2: Madbox system and dashboards built with Next.js + Supabase.

wins.0: GPT-5 blueprint analysis with 80% accuracy on construction cost estimation.
wins.1: Secure multi-tenant architecture with Row-Level Security on Supabase.
wins.2: Voice AI integration (Retell) for field use.

wins.0: Scalable RESTful APIs in Laravel 11 (−30% production bugs).
wins.2: API documentation with Laravel Scribe and Postman.
